title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates:
B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates!
